title: Document Chat Settings Field Mappings (gh-214)
description:
GitHub Issue #214: Document how chat settings fields map to backend functionality.

CONTEXT FROM CODEBASE ANALYSIS:

## Chat Model Fields (schema.prisma, Chat model lines 217-253)

| Field | Type | DB Column | Purpose | Used By |
|-------|------|-----------|---------|---------|
| managerTelegramIds | String[] | manager_telegram_ids | Override global SLA notification managers per chat | alert.service.ts, escalation.service.ts, ChatSettingsForm |
| accountantTelegramIds | BigInt[] | accountant_telegram_ids | Immutable Telegram IDs of accountants (auto-populated from usernames, gh-68) | alert.service.ts, escalation.service.ts, config.service.ts |
| accountantUsernames | String[] | accountant_usernames | Telegram @usernames of accountants (UI-editable) | ChatSettingsForm, chats.ts router |
| assignedAccountantId | String? (UUID) | assigned_accountant_id | Primary accountant user reference | ChatSettingsForm (AccountantSelect), User relation |
| slaEnabled | Boolean | sla_enabled | Enable/disable SLA monitoring for chat | sla-timer.worker.ts, ChatSettingsForm |
| slaThresholdMinutes | Int | sla_threshold_minutes | SLA breach threshold in minutes | timer.service.ts, ChatSettingsForm |
| notifyInChatOnBreach | Boolean | notify_in_chat_on_breach | Send breach alerts to group chat (TEST ONLY) | alert.worker.ts, ChatSettingsForm |
| clientTier | ClientTier | client_tier | VIP tier for differentiated SLA (gh-76) | config.service.ts tier defaults |
| monitoringEnabled | Boolean | monitoring_enabled | Master monitoring switch | list filter, chat-event.handler |
| is24x7Mode | Boolean | is_24x7_mode | Ignore working hours for SLA | timer.service.ts |
| isMigrated | Boolean | is_migrated | Group→supergroup migration flag (buh-5xx) | list filter |
| deletedAt | DateTime? | deleted_at | Soft-delete timestamp (gh-209) | list/query filters |

## Notification Fallback Chain (config.service.ts lines 230-262, getRecipientsByLevel)

Level 1 (initial breach/warning):
  1. chat.accountantTelegramIds → if any exist, send to accountants
  2. FALLBACK: chat.managerTelegramIds → GlobalSettings.globalManagerIds → []

Level 2+ (escalation):
  1. BOTH: chat.managerTelegramIds + chat.accountantTelegramIds (deduplicated)
  2. If neither, fallback to GlobalSettings.globalManagerIds

## Why accountant fields exist separately from manager fields:
- accountantUsernames: Human-editable @usernames, entered in UI
- accountantTelegramIds: Auto-populated immutable IDs from username resolution (gh-68), used for Telegram API calls
- assignedAccountantId: UUID reference to User model for DB relations/auth
- managerTelegramIds: Override recipients for this specific chat, different from accountants

## Frontend→Backend Field Mapping:
- ChatSettingsForm.tsx sends: slaEnabled, slaThresholdMinutes, assignedAccountantId, accountantUsernames, notifyInChatOnBreach, managerTelegramIds
- chats.ts update mutation: validates usernames, auto-populates accountantTelegramIds, adds assigned user's username to list
- chats.ts getById: returns accountantVerification (resolved username→found→hasTelegramId status)

DELIVERABLES:
1. Add inline comments to Chat model in schema.prisma explaining each field's purpose
2. Create ADR documenting why accountant fields are separate from manager fields
3. Closes gh-214
close_reason: Documentation added: schema.prisma comments + ADR-004. PR #219 created.

title: gh-237: Fix Prisma migration EACCES + rollback failure
description:
GitHub Issue: #237
Score: 30 (sev=10, imp=10, lkh=10)

ROOT CAUSE 1: Prisma Migration EACCES
- backend/Dockerfile creates USER nodejs (uid 1001) but no HOME or npm_config_cache env var
- github-deploy.sh:387 runs 'docker exec buhbot-bot-backend npx prisma migrate deploy'
- npx tries to write npm cache as uid 1001 to non-writable dir → EACCES

ROOT CAUSE 2: Rollback failure
- No pre-check for Docker image existence
- deploy.yml rollback only triggers on steps.deploy failure, not healthcheck failure
- Dead NODE_VERSION: '18' env var never used

SOLUTION:
1. Dockerfile: add ENV HOME=/app, ENV npm_config_cache=/app/.npm, mkdir+chown .npm dir
2. Deploy script: change 'npx prisma migrate deploy' → './node_modules/.bin/prisma migrate deploy'
3. Rollback: add docker image inspect check before re-tagging
4. deploy.yml: fix rollback condition to 'if: failure()', remove dead NODE_VERSION
5. Remove deprecated docker-compose version attribute

FILES:
- backend/Dockerfile (lines 72-76)
- infrastructure/scripts/github-deploy.sh (lines 384-394, 450-501)

title: Stop and disable unnecessary system services
description: Остановить и отключить ненужные сервисы хостинг-панели на VDS: exim4 (SMTP 25/465/587), dovecot (IMAP/POP3 110/143/993/995), proftpd (FTP 21), named/BIND (DNS 53), mysql (3306), ihttpd (1500). ПРОВЕРКА: sudo ss -tlnp не должен показывать порты 21,25,53,110,143,465,587,993,995,1500,3306.

title: Harden SSH configuration
description: Усилить конфигурацию SSH. ТЕКУЩЕЕ СОСТОЯНИЕ: /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/40-hosting.conf содержит: PermitRootLogin prohibit-password, PubkeyAuthentication yes, PasswordAuthentication no, PermitEmptyPasswords no. Основной sshd_config: X11Forwarding yes (ненужно). ПЛАН: 1) Изменить в /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/40-hosting.conf: PermitRootLogin no (вместо prohibit-password). 2) Добавить MaxAuthTries 3, ClientAliveInterval 300, ClientAliveCountMax 2. 3) В основном /etc/ssh/sshd_config: X11Forwarding no. 4) Перезапустить: sudo systemctl restart ssh. ПРОВЕРКА: sudo sshd -T | grep -E 'permitrootlogin|x11forwarding|maxauthtries'. ВАЖНО: не закрывать текущую SSH-сессию до проверки что новая сессия работает.
close_reason: SSH hardened: PermitRootLogin no, MaxAuthTries 3, ClientAliveInterval 300, ClientAliveCountMax 2, X11Forwarding no. Backup at 40-hosting.conf.bak.20260318. Verified via sshd -T and test connection.
